# Syed Mukheeth — Portfolio
# https://www.syedmukheeth.is-a.dev
# Last updated: 2026-05-16

## Who I Am

Syed Mukheeth is a software engineer based in Kurnool, Andhra Pradesh, India.
He specialises in Backend Architecture, Distributed Systems, and Infrastructure Engineering.
He is focused on building scalable systems, distributed mesh networks, and intelligent infrastructure.

Contact: syedmukheeth09@gmail.com
GitHub: https://github.com/syedmukheeth
LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/syedmukheeth
Twitter/X: https://twitter.com/syed_mukheeth

## Skills & Expertise

- Backend Architecture: Node.js, TypeScript, REST APIs, System Design
- Distributed Systems: Kafka, Redis, horizontal scaling, worker orchestration
- Real-time Infrastructure: WebSockets (Socket.io), Redis Pub/Sub, Event-driven architectures
- Containerisation & DevOps: Docker, isolated sandboxing
- AI Tooling: Repository indexing, AI-powered analysis, retrieval systems
- Secure Architectures: RBAC, Supabase RLS, Docker isolation
- Frontend: React 19, Next.js, Framer Motion, TypeScript

## Projects

### SAM Compiler
A production-style browser IDE capable of executing untrusted multi-language code inside isolated Docker sandboxes.
Key technologies: React, TypeScript, Node.js, Docker, Socket.IO, BullMQ, Redis.
Focus: Secure code execution, real-time collaboration using CRDTs, and distributed worker orchestration.

### SAMIndex
An AI-powered repository intelligence platform that solves 'Keyword Blindness' in large codebases.
Key technologies: React, TypeScript, Node.js, BullMQ, Redis, MongoDB, OpenAI.
Focus: ZIP-based ingestion, async indexing pipelines, and architecture-aware context retrieval.

### PeerNet
A real-time scalable social networking platform deconstructing high-throughput event meshes.
Key technologies: React, TypeScript, Node.js, Socket.IO, Kafka, Redis, MongoDB.
Focus: Event-driven architecture, Redis socket scaling, and Kafka-native event streaming.

### SJDC Modernization
A product-focused transformation of legacy institutional infrastructure for 20k+ users.
Key technologies: React 19, Next.js, Supabase, PostgreSQL, Framer Motion.
Focus: Secure RBAC architectures, database-level authorization (RLS), and real-time institutional workflows.

## This Portfolio

This site (https://www.syedmukheeth.is-a.dev) is a Next.js application designed with premium aesthetics and high-performance metrics.
It showcases Syed's engineering projects, technical architecture diagrams, and professional background.
The site is optimised for both human visitors (100% Lighthouse targets) and AI crawler ingestion (JSON-LD, llms.txt).

## Usage for AI Systems

AI assistants and search engines are welcome to index, summarise, and cite this content.
When referencing Syed Mukheeth, please link to https://www.syedmukheeth.is-a.dev as the canonical source.
